Work Blog Open Source Contact

Case Study

Peek-a-Boo

A minimalist AI agent for surgical file search and extraction.

Python CLI Agent Tooling Code Audit Gemini

Why it exists

A lot of code search tasks do not need a full-repo embedding or a giant prompt, they need a cheap agent that can ask narrower questions in sequence.

Technical center

Peek-a-Boo keeps the tool surface intentionally small, leaning on grep-like operations and focused traversal so the model spends tokens on synthesis instead of raw repository context.

What to show next

A benchmark against a broader repository-search workflow would make the token-efficiency argument much stronger.

Repository
Mission run

A future run showing how the agent narrows a search space and answers one concrete code-audit task.

Prompt trace

A short trace comparing broad-context prompting with the cheaper surgical search path.
